title: mentha × villosa f. gillotii
intro: Mentha × villosa f. gillotii, also known as pineapple mint or gillotti's mint, is a hybrid species of mint that is a cross between Mentha × villosa and other mint species. This plant is known for its distinctive pineapple-like fragrance and is often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa f. gillotii include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and aiding in respiratory problems, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, essential oil, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
